title: [MTR4] VDL Citea LLE-120
description: VDL Citea remodel of the ADL Enviro200 made by CinderaceOTS for MTR
body:
This pack adds the VDL Citea LLE-120 bus, a retexture of CinderaceOTS' ADL Enviro200 model. It comes in many liveries, based on every operator in the Randstad area in the Netherlands. (check the screenshots)

It also contains a slightly different soundset compared to the base model.

If you are looking for the base model, the Enviro200, it's not on this website. Please join the [SMTR Discord Server](https://discord.gg/zM5PydRdtH) instead.
